name: warhawk-extension

changelog.1.9.4: v5.0 Listing Management Overhaul — photo_selection_mode enum, strict fb_listing_id delete with NULL-ID recovery, snapshot refresh flow (new-row-per-repost with FB-live scrape), hard version gate for snapshot-dependent flows, telemetry + /analytics/telemetry dashboard. Codex patches: forced Marketplace category to 'Miscellaneous' everywhere including snapshot reposts, hardened Price/Category detection for updated FB labels, combined DataTransfer for photos+video single-input FB flows. Ships with v5.0 pre-deploy fixes (Scan B): queue retry version gate, snapshot quality gate, fire-and-forget telemetry, retry status guard, LISTING_STATUSES sync, zero-stride backfill repair.
changelog.1.7.1: Rewrite form-filler and form-detector from Spartan extension patterns — reactType() with _valueTracker reset, humanClick() with full mouse event sequence, findFBInput() with label nesting and combobox guards. Fixes category dropdown crash, Illegal invocation errors, and element-not-found for title/price.
changelog.1.7.0: Delete pipeline, posting history tracking, TypeScript strict null fixes.
changelog.1.3.0: First-time auth flow — popup login form, email/password auth via Supabase.
changelog.1.2.0: Heartbeat reporter — upserts runtime status to Supabase every 60s.
changelog.1.1.0: Orchestrator tab, watchdog timeout, session stats, crash recovery.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — background worker, content script, popup with queue controls.

notes: Install options: (1) Clone this repo + load 'extension/' unpacked at chrome://extensions, or (2) Download releases/warhawk-extension-v1.9.4.zip + unzip + load unpacked. CWS listing pending review.
